turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, my employer has Paramount Health TPA. Just wanted to confirm before I come in for a check-up — is it accepted?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello! Let me check... Yes, Paramount Health TPA is on our approved panel. You can use it for OPD as well as in-patient procedures.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh nice. For OPD do I need any pre-approval?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For routine OPD consultations, most Paramount plans don't require pre-approval. Just show your TPA card and a valid photo ID at the front desk. The consultant charges will be billed directly.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: What if I need a diagnostic test like a blood test or X-ray?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: For diagnostics ordered during your OPD visit, those are typically covered under the same cashless arrangement. Just make sure the doctor's prescription is stamped and the lab request goes through our in-house diagnostics wing.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Perfect. I'll come by Thursday then.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Wonderful, we'll see you Thursday. Is there anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: No, all good. Thanks so much.
